title: web-component server-side rendering (was jssm#686)
manager: Make the machine web component render on the server — produce meaningful markup during SSR so a machine embedded in a Next/Nuxt/Astro page appears in the initial HTML and hydrates cleanly, rather than flashing empty until client JS boots. It is table-stakes for embedding machines in modern framework-rendered sites and for pages that need those machines to be crawlable.
